hero.subtitle: State-of-the-art ensemble ML models analyze 8 clinical health parameters to deliver instant, explainable diabetes risk predictions.

predict.pageSubtitle: Fill in your health information below. It takes less than 60 seconds.
predict.resultSubtitle: Here are your personalized results with AI-powered explanations.
predict.hypertensionTooltip: Do you have a diagnosis of high blood pressure?
predict.heartDiseaseTooltip: Have you been diagnosed with any form of heart disease?
predict.bmiTooltip: Body Mass Index = kg / m². Normal: 18.5–24.9
predict.hba1cTooltip: HbA1c reflects 2–3 month average blood sugar. Normal: <5.7%
predict.glucoseTooltip: Fasting blood glucose in mg/dL. Normal: <100
predict.emailDesc: Receive a detailed HTML report with your risk level and contributing factors.
predict.disclaimer: ⚠️ This tool is for informational purposes only. Results are not a substitute for professional medical diagnosis.
predict.queuedSubtitle: Our AI is processing your health information…

results.lowRisk: Great news! Your risk is low.
results.highRisk: High risk — please consult a doctor.
results.modelUsed: Our {{model}} model estimates your probability at {{probability}}%.
results.emailSent: A detailed report has been sent to your email.
results.shapSubtitle: SHAP values show how each feature affects your risk
results.autoSelected: This model was automatically selected from Logistic Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, XGBoost, and LightGBM based on highest ROC-AUC.
results.medicalDisclaimer: ⚠️ This AI assessment is for informational purposes only. It does not constitute medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional.

history.title: Prediction History
history.subtitle: Your past risk assessments
history.loginPrompt: Login to view your prediction history
history.empty: No predictions yet. Start your first assessment!

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your history
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign In
